title: It's A Baguette!
description: A simple mod that adds baguettes
body:
This mod includes:

- Item: Baguette made with 3 bread, Hunger: 15, Saturation: 7.3
- Advancement: "Loafing Around" for obtaining bread
- Advancement: "Vive la Baguette!" for obtaining a baguette

Credits:
Stardew Valley for the baguette texture
